_description: Data-highlight card for sharing a single striking statistic or metric with supporting context. Supports an optional background image with automatic dark scrim for text legibility. Best for LinkedIn carousels, Instagram Stories, and data-driven content. Each slide should vary 'bg' and 'accent' to create visual rhythm across a deck.

_slots.eyebrow: optional — short uppercase tag above the rule. 1–4 words. Sets the topic or category. E.g. 'Industry Report', 'Q3 2024', 'Key Finding'.
_slots.metric: REQUIRED — the hero number or statistic. 1–5 characters for maximum impact at 240px. E.g. '73%', '$4.2T', '10×', '1 in 3'. Longer strings will wrap but lose punch.
_slots.context: REQUIRED — one sentence explaining the metric. 4–12 words. Displayed at 52px below the number. E.g. 'of employees would quit for better culture'.
_slots.detail: optional — elaboration paragraph. 1–2 sentences adding nuance, comparison, or implication. Shown at reduced opacity below a dot separator.
_slots.source: optional — data source attribution at the bottom. Shown uppercase in monospace. E.g. 'McKinsey, 2024' or 'n = 12,000 respondents'.
_slots.bg-image: optional — background image. Local path relative to data JSON, absolute path, or https URL. A dark gradient scrim is applied automatically so text remains legible. Works best with wide, atmospheric photos rather than busy detailed images.
_slots.bg: optional — hex background color. Default #0b0a09 (warm near-black). Used as the base when no bg-image is set. Dark backgrounds make vivid accent metrics pop. Try #0a1628 for blue-tinted, #120a0a for red-tinted.
_slots.accent: optional — hex accent color for the metric number, rule, eyebrow, and dots. Default #ff6b35 (vivid orange). Use saturated, bright colors for best contrast against dark backgrounds.
_slots.ink: optional — hex text color for context, detail, and secondary elements. Default #f0ece4 (warm white). Should contrast strongly with 'bg'.

title: The State of Work 2024

slides.context: of employees would quit for better workplace culture
slides.detail: Culture now outranks compensation as the #1 driver of attrition across every industry surveyed.

slides.context: projected global AI market size by 2030
slides.detail: That's a 13× increase from 2023 levels — faster than the mobile revolution.

slides.context: the warming threshold we are about to cross
slides.detail: Every fraction of a degree matters — 1.5° vs 2° means 10 million fewer people exposed to severe heat.

slides.context: cheaper to retain than to replace a senior engineer
startups fail because they build something nobody wants
slides.detail: The most common cause of failure isn't money — it's building without listening.
